channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Consequences of Gavin Newsom's Fiscal Mismanagement
item.description: Representative Vince Fong aims to curb California's overspending and provide relief to business owners.

item.title: California's Flawed Electoral System
item.description: The current situation is not inevitable.

item.title: Trump Booed at Knicks Game, but Crowd's Loudest Jeers Reserved for Spurs
item.description: President Trump was booed during the national anthem at the Knicks' first NBA Finals home game on Monday.

item.title: Trump Confirms Pilots Unharmed After U.S. Helicopter Crash Near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A U.S. Army helicopter crashed near the Strait of Hormuz; President Trump said both crew members were uninjured.
